name: title-card-two-tone
transitionVerb: Kicker fades+drops from y-16px over f1-6; headline rises word-group by word-group from +18px (white words first, then the accent word tint-sweeps L->R over ~8f), groups ~6f apart settling by ~f20; radial glow blooms behind 14f.

name: big-stat-number
transitionVerb: Numeral holds start ~6f then counts up with strong ease-out (0->98% over ~24f, fast->slow) scaling 0.9->1 with 1.06 overshoot settle; accent unit suffix pops in beside it 6f; label + glow bloom fade up 8f after number lands.

kicker.text: A SECRET MOST MISS / TRACTION / NN — THE MATH

subLabel.text: STARS ON GITHUB / fewer tokens per query

supportingCards.type: equation cards or stat chips row

name: cta-comment-outro
transitionVerb: 'Comment' fades up 6f; giant 'AI' snaps in scale 1.06->1 with accent/gradient sweeping across glyphs over ~8f + glow bloom + blinking caret; input bar slides up from +40px 8f, send button pops overshoot 6f; subtitle + handle pill rise under it 4-6f later.

kicker.text: GET THE LINK / DROP A COMMENT

subtitle.text: and I'll DM the GitHub repo.

inputBar.elements: avatar(accent ring) + typed 'A I |' + send button(accent circle/Post/paper-plane)

name: terminal-mockup-card
transitionVerb: Headline pops word-by-word ~1/4f; terminal card scales 0.96->1 + fades up 10-12f; command types char-by-char ~2 chars/f with blinking block caret; orange progress bar fills 0->100% width over ~18f; green '✓ success' line pops in last.

headline.text: Type. Paste. Watch. (accent on last word)

terminalCard.body: comment line grey, $ command ($ accent / cmd white), resolving line, accent progress bar L->R, ✓ installed · N skills · 0 errors (green)

name: feature-rows-list
transitionVerb: Headline slides left-in ~8f; rows cascade up one-by-one bottom-edge ~6f each with ~5f stagger (3-card list lands ~33f), each scaling 0.96->1 + fade; accent icon/border/✓ badge pops 2-3f after its row lands (solution checks bloom green glow).

kicker.text: WHAT IT'S BUILT TO DO / WHAT WENT WRONG

headline.text: Five jobs. One model. (accent on 2nd clause)

rows.perRow: accent monoline icon in square (left) + bold title + accent mono sub-caption
rows.valence: accent-bordered; problem=red/orange tint; solution=green border + ✓ check badge; CTA/Comment row=green focus

name: feature-card-grid
transitionVerb: Headline settles; four cards fade+rise in Z-order stagger (TL->TR->BL->BR), each scale 0.94->1 over 6f ~5f apart; accent top-border (or icon glyph) wipes/pops in 2-3f after each card lands.

headline.text: Type once. Ship anything. (accent on payoff)

grid.fill: DARK #13141B / LIGHT frosted white / amber-tint #140E07 in gold reels
grid.perCard: small accent icon top-left + numbered mono kicker (01 · INTERACTIVE) + bold title ~2.8% + grey one-line desc

name: grid-vs-terminal
transitionVerb: Headline builds ~12f; two solid placeholder squares slide up from below ~10f, then cross-fade their contents in (left->color grid/GUI card, right->terminal text) over ~12f; circular accent VS badge pops scale 0->1 + slight rotate at ~f10; mono labels type under each ~6f.

kicker.text: UNDER THE HOOD / NN — THE MECHANISM / THE HONEST TAKE

headline.text: Replace it fully? Probably not. (accent or de-emphasis on 2nd clause)

leftBlock.label: IMAGES / BRAINS / CLAUDE DESIGN · GUI
leftBlock.content: color-tile grid or cream GUI mock

name: brand-lockup
transitionVerb: Spark icon scales 0->1 with spoke/ray bloom 8-10f; lockup wordmark scales 0.9->1 + fades as one block 8f, accent part/period dropping in ~4f later (or wiping L->R 8f); repo/credit card slides up from below +40px over 10f; orange glow pulse blooms behind ~14f.

sparkIcon.type: Anthropic burst glyph (radiating spokes) OR rounded-square app tile (white asterisk on accent fill)

lockupWordmark.accentPart: one word or period recolored accent

subLabel.text: A CLAUDE CODE SKILL · DEVINI LABS

repoCard.content: GitHub mark + owner/repo mono + tag chips (● JUST DROPPED, Personal use license)
